calendar.matters:
Order Dispensing With Notice To Minor'S Father And Recalendar Case Without The Requirement Of Publication.
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult & of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Rhonda Renee Boyland, present in pro per for self and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Kyla Lourial Grayson, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name(s) were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of an Adult to: Rhonda Renee Muhammad, and of the Minors to: Kyla Lourial Muhammad.
Decree signed in open court.

Amended Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Reset To Aug-31-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioner: Rhonda Renee Boyland, present in pro per for self and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Kyla Lourial Grayson, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor is continued to Aug. 31, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or request for an Order dispensing notice.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
